title: Quality Assurance Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Pickyourtrail is India's most loved leisure travel brand for millennials, helping over 100,000 travelers across 14 countries craft unforgettable vacations. Renowned for its personalized travel experiences and innovative approach, Pickyourtrail is committed to redefining the way people explore the world. With a focus on customer satisfaction and technological excellence, the company continuously strives to deliver seamless and memorable travel planning solutions.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a detail\\-oriented QA Engineer to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will be responsible for ensuring the quality and reliability of our travel platform. Your primary focus will be on testing various aspects of our product, identifying bugs, and collaborating with product and development teams to enhance overall user experience. This position offers an exciting opportunity to work in a fast\\-paced environment, contributing directly to the quality of products used by thousands of travelers worldwide.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate should possess a strong attention to detail and a problem\\-solving mindset. Basic understanding of manual testing concepts is essential, along with a proactive attitude and ownership\\-driven approach. Candidates should be eager to learn automation techniques and AI\\-based testing tools. Prior experience in software quality assurance, even at an entry level, will be advantageous. A degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field is preferred but not mandatory if complemented by relevant skills and experience.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Review existing product workflows and ensure they align with Business Requirement Documents (BRD) through comprehensive manual testing.
* Take ownership of testing processes for new builds, updates, and product features, ensuring they meet quality standards before release.
* Analyze existing bookings and user flows to identify bugs, inconsistencies, and areas for improvement.
* Create detailed and clear test cases, test scenarios, and acceptance criteria to guide testing activities.
* Collaborate with development teams to communicate bugs and issues effectively, ensuring timely resolution.
* Gradually adopt and implement AI tools to automate repetitive test cases, increasing efficiency and coverage.
* Participate in sprint planning and review meetings to provide insights on quality metrics and testing progress.


**Benefits**
* Opportunity to work in a fast\\-paced, high\\-growth environment with innovative travel solutions.
* Hands\\-on experience with real product scenarios, enhancing technical and problem\\-solving skills.
* Potential to transition into automation and AI testing roles as skills develop.
* Early ownership of projects, fostering leadership and career growth.
* Competitive salary package aligned with industry standards.
* Flexible work environment and collaborative team culture.
* Access to learning resources and opportunities for professional development.


 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Pickyourtrail is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, age, sexual orientation, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that diverse teams drive innovation and excellence, and we welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds.

 We are seeking a talented and passionate Senior Flutter Developer to join our dynamic team at SmartQ. In this role, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining high\\-performance, scalable, and innovative mobile applications for both Android and iOS platforms. You will work closely with our design and product teams to create seamless user experiences that align with our company's vision of transforming the food\\-tech industry. Your expertise will contribute to building robust applications that support our global operations and enhance our clients' satisfaction. This position offers an exciting opportunity to be part of a forward\\-thinking organization committed to technological excellence and innovation.
   

  

 You will be expected to lead the development of new features, troubleshoot existing issues, optimize application performance, and ensure code quality through rigorous testing and reviews. Collaboration across teams, staying updated with the latest industry trends, and contributing to process improvements will be key aspects of your role. If you are passionate about mobile development and eager to make a significant impact in a fast\\-paced environment, this role is ideal for you.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate should possess a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience. Proven experience in developing mobile applications using Flutter, with a strong portfolio of completed projects, is essential. You should have proficiency in Dart programming language and a solid understanding of Flutter's architecture. Experience working with RESTful APIs, third\\-party libraries, and cloud services is required. Strong problem\\-solving skills, attention to detail, and the ability to troubleshoot and optimize code for performance are critical. Familiarity with version control systems such as Git, CI/CD pipelines, and integrating third\\-party SDKs will be advantageous. Excellent communication skills and the ability to work collaboratively in a dynamic environment are also important.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Develop and maintain high\\-quality mobile applications using the Flutter framework, ensuring scalability and performance.
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams including design, product management, and backend development to define, design, and implement new features.
* Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code while adhering to best practices and coding standards.
* Conduct thorough testing, including unit and widget testing, to ensure application stability and high code coverage.
* Optimize application performance by identifying bottlenecks and implementing appropriate solutions.
* Integrate APIs and third\\-party SDKs to enhance app functionalities and user experience.
* Participate in code reviews, knowledge sharing sessions, and contribute to continuous improvement of development processes.
* Stay updated with the latest industry trends, tools, and technologies to ensure our applications remain cutting\\-edge.
* Assist in troubleshooting and resolving bugs or issues reported by users or QA teams.


**Benefits**
 SmartQ offers a comprehensive benefits package designed to support our employees' well\\-being and professional growth. We provide competitive salary packages, health insurance coverage, and wellness programs. Employees have access to continuous learning opportunities, including training sessions, workshops, and conferences, to enhance their skills and career development. We promote a flexible work environment that encourages work\\-life balance, along with paid time off and leave policies. Additionally, our collaborative culture fosters innovation, creativity, and a sense of belonging, making SmartQ an inspiring place to work where your contributions truly matter.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 SmartQ is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to creating an inclusive environment where all employees and applicants are treated with respect and fairness. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other protected status. We believe diversity enhances our innovation and success, and we actively seek to promote a workplace that reflects the diverse communities we serve. We welcome applications from all qualified individuals who are eager to contribute to our mission and growth.

title: Sr Backend Developer
description:
**About The Company**
 Zabe is an innovative and dynamic company dedicated to revolutionizing e\\-commerce management. Our platform, Zabe Sync, offers an integrated solution that simplifies the complexities faced by high\\-growth brands operating across multiple sales channels. By providing real\\-time inventory synchronization, seamless order management, automated accounting integrations with Tally and Zoho, and shipping solutions, we help businesses prevent overselling, streamline operations, and scale efficiently. Our commitment to technological excellence and customer\\-centric solutions positions us as a leader in the e\\-commerce technology space.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As Zabe continues to expand its infrastructure to support an increasing number of sales channels and higher transaction volumes, we are seeking a highly skilled Lead Backend Engineer. This role is pivotal in shaping the technical direction of our platform, ensuring robust, scalable, and efficient backend systems. The ideal candidate thrives in high\\-stakes environments, demonstrates a high degree of technical autonomy, and possesses a passion for building reliable and innovative solutions. You will lead a team of talented engineers, drive architectural decisions, and contribute directly to the evolution of our core platform.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The successful candidate will have a strong background in backend development, with at least three years of experience working on high\\-traffic JVM\\-based systems. Proven ownership of projects from conception through deployment is essential, along with a deep understanding of NoSQL databases like MongoDB. A bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related fields is preferred, though equivalent hands\\-on experience is also acceptable. Candidates should possess excellent problem\\-solving skills, a proactive mindset, and the ability to work collaboratively with cross\\-functional teams including UI/UX and DevOps.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Architect \\& Build: Design and develop scalable server\\-side logic utilizing Java or Kotlin and Spring Boot frameworks. Ensure the backend can handle complex inventory synchronization, real\\-time transaction processing, and high concurrency levels efficiently.
* End\\-to\\-End Delivery: Take ownership of features from initial database schema design in MongoDB to deployment on cloud infrastructure such as AWS, ensuring seamless integration and performance.
* Lead Technical Strategy: Make critical decisions related to system architecture, API design, and system reliability to support business growth and operational stability.
* Optimize Performance: Address and resolve deep technical challenges related to concurrency, data consistency, and high\\-frequency API polling to ensure optimal platform performance.
* Mentor \\& Standardize: Uphold coding standards through rigorous code reviews, mentoring team members, and fostering a culture of continuous improvement and technical excellence.


**Benefits**
 Joining Zabe offers an exciting opportunity to be part of a fast\\-moving startup environment where your contributions make a tangible impact. We provide competitive compensation packages, flexible work arrangements, and a collaborative culture that encourages innovation. You will have access to professional development opportunities, cutting\\-edge technologies, and the chance to work alongside passionate and talented professionals. Our environment promotes growth, learning, and ownership, empowering you to build your career while helping thousands of e\\-commerce businesses succeed.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Zabe is an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering an inclusive and diverse workplace. We welcome applications from all qualified candidates regardless of race, gender, age, religion, sexual orientation, or disability. Our hiring process is designed to be fair and equitable, ensuring that every applicant is evaluated based on their skills, experience, and potential to contribute to our team. We believe that diversity drives innovation and are dedicated to creating a workplace where everyone feels valued and empowered.

title: IT Support Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 ETG is a leading global organization dedicated to delivering innovative solutions across various sectors, including finance, technology, and manufacturing. Renowned for its commitment to excellence and customer\\-centric approach, ETG fosters a dynamic and inclusive work environment that encourages growth and professional development. With a strong presence in multiple countries, the company continuously invests in cutting\\-edge technologies and talent to maintain its competitive edge and drive sustainable success.
   

  

**About The Role**
 ETG's Information Technology department is seeking an experienced Junior IT Support Engineer to provide comprehensive support to end\\-users across various office locations. The successful candidate will play a vital role in maintaining the smooth operation of hardware and software systems, troubleshooting technical issues, and ensuring optimal user productivity. This role offers an excellent opportunity for individuals passionate about IT support and eager to work in a fast\\-paced, collaborative environment. The Junior IT Support Engineer will be responsible for managing user accounts, resolving technical problems, and supporting the deployment of new technologies, thereby contributing to the overall efficiency of the company's IT infrastructure.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate should possess a minimum of 2\\-4 years of relevant experience in IT support roles. Educational qualifications include a Bachelor's degree in Computer Applications (BCA), B.Tech, or B.E. in any specialization. Certifications related to Windows Operating Systems, Office 365, or other relevant IT domains are highly desirable. Additional knowledge in cloud platforms such as AWS or Azure, cybersecurity, or other emerging technologies will be considered an advantage. The candidate must demonstrate strong technical expertise, excellent problem\\-solving skills, and the ability to adapt to evolving technology landscapes.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Provide technical support to end\\-users across multiple office locations, resolving hardware, software, and network issues promptly and efficiently.
* Manage user accounts, groups, and licenses within the Office 365 environment, ensuring proper access controls and security protocols.
* Configure and maintain endpoint computing devices, including laptops and desktops, to ensure optimal performance and security.
* Assist in the deployment, configuration, and management of Office 365 applications such as Exchange Online, SharePoint Online, Teams, and OneDrive.
* Handle desktop troubleshooting tasks, including Outlook, antivirus solutions, basic networking, and OS/application issues.
* Implement and monitor antivirus and malware protection solutions on endpoints and servers to safeguard company data.
* Conduct remote troubleshooting sessions to resolve end\\-user issues efficiently, minimizing downtime.
* Utilize Service Management tools to log incidents, track resolution progress, and ensure timely closure.
* Participate in incident resolution and develop preventive measures to avoid recurrence of common issues.
* Assist in maintaining documentation related to system configurations, procedures, and troubleshooting guides.
* Stay updated with the latest IT trends and technologies to recommend improvements and enhancements to existing systems.


**Benefits**
 ETG offers a competitive benefits package that includes health insurance, paid time off, and opportunities for professional development. Employees will have access to ongoing training programs, certifications, and career advancement pathways. The company promotes a healthy work\\-life balance and provides a supportive environment to foster innovation and collaboration. Additionally, team members are encouraged to participate in various corporate initiatives and social responsibility programs, enriching their overall work experience.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 ETG is an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering an inclusive workplace. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, national origin, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe in providing equal employment opportunities to all qualified candidates and ensuring a work environment that respects diversity and promotes fairness at every level of the organization.
